category_sources: source_facts.description says HDF5 is a file format for large amounts of data; official HDF Group HDF5 page describes the library and file format for heterogeneous data.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide hdf5-mpi.
docs_sources: Official HDF Group documentation site is the dedicated docs surface; official HDF5 product page is the homepage in source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/HDFGroup/hdf5, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.name identifies the MPI build; source_facts.description identifies the HDF5 large-data file format; source_facts.executables lists parallel HDF5 tools such as h5pcc.
